features: Complete Set of Bun Clips & Curby Grips: Includes 2" & 2.75" 100 kirby grips & 2", 2.36” 100 u pins hair pins for women, and 100 clear bands with box. Perfect bun clips for hair bobby pins lovers
Easy to Sort Hair Grips for Thick Hair: Each type is sorted in boxes. Choose the right bun hair pins or curby grips easily—great for thin or thick hair styling
Strong Hold U Bobby Pins for Thick Hair: Made of sturdy metal with 3-wave design. These ballet hair pins keep buns firm. Ball ends protect scalp during wear
Ideal for All Occasions & Hairstyles: Great for buns, braids, curls & updos. Use bun grips or kirby grips at weddings, shows, or daily wear for women & dancers
Natural Look with Invisible Curby Grips: Brown bun clips and clear bands blend into hair. U pins hair pins for women give a clean, seamless finish every time
description: This 300pcs FAMVIDA hair styling kit Includes 2" & 2.75" 100 kirby grips & 2", 2.36” 100 u pins hair pins for women, and 100 clear bands with box—perfect bun clips for hair bobby pins lovers. Designed for easy organization, each type is neatly sorted in compartments, making it simple to choose the right bun hair pins or curby grips for thick or thin hair. Made from durable metal with a 3-wave grip, these ballet hair pins and u bobby pins for thick hair offer a secure hold while protecting your scalp with rounded ends. Whether you're creating buns, curls, or updos, these bun grips and curby grips are ideal for daily use or special occasions like weddings, performances, or dance competitions. The tones and clear bands blend naturally with your hair, offering a polished, invisible finish.
